THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARENT, WYATT BAKER, BREANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANTERN LOFTS $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.58 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,466.58, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE REQUESTED $1800.00 IN DAMAGES UNDER 1950.5 SUBD (1) IS WARRANTED FOR BAD FAITH RETENTION OF THE $2500.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT.
